Texts.Jobs:Evening:RemindMarkAsFinished:

Time to slow down and prepare for rest😴

Texts.Jobs:MoodReport:Weekly:Caption:
Hey, what's up? I want to show you dynamics of your mood changes during the week!

Think about how was your week and think which situations affected you the most
Texts.Jobs:MoodReport:Monthly:Caption:
Hello hello! That's the end of the month, here is how you felt since the first day!
Have a good rest and see you tomorrow🌒
Texts.Jobs:Feedback:
Hey, hope you're doing great!💫
I'd like to hear your feedback, click /feedback to start, it will take less than a minute
